title: The Animal With Three Hearts

scenes.text: An octopus has three hearts, nine brains, and blue blood.
Two of those hearts stop beating every time it swims, which is why it prefers to crawl.
Its blood is blue because it runs on copper instead of iron.
And each of its eight arms can taste, touch, and decide on its own.
scenes.label: ARMS THAT THINK
scenes.sub: each one decides on its own

scenes.text: Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: An octopus has 3 hearts, 9 brains and blue copper-based blood - and every arm thinks for itself. Follow for daily facts!
